execution_trace.input_query: What are the core phases of the SMILE methodology?

retrieved_context.content: SMILE Six-Phase Digital Twin Journey: (1) Reality Emulation, (2) Concurrent Engineering, (3) Collective Intelligence, (4) Contextual Intelligence, (5) Continuous Intelligence, (6) Perpetual Wisdom.
Core Principle: Impact first, data last. 6 Phases: Reality Emulation, Concurrent Engineering, Collective Intelligence, Contextual Intelligence...

final_result.answer: The core phases of the SMILE methodology are: (1) Reality Emulation, (2) Concurrent Engineering, (3) Collective Intelligence, (4) Contextual Intelligence, (5) Continuous Intelligence, and (6) Perpetual Wisdom.
steps: Start with the outcome, not the data
Connect physical sensors and meet KPIs
